scripts.content:latam: node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx LatTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:mexico: node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx MexTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:china: node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx ChaTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:europe: node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx EuTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:uk: node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/build-master.ts && node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/qa-content.ts && node --import tsx UKTm/scripts/build-content.ts
scripts.content:prepare: npm run content:latam && npm run content:mexico && npm run content:usa && npm run content:japan && npm run content:china && npm run content:europe && npm run content:uk && npm run content:reports && node scripts/sync-generated-content.mjs
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:pages: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/prerender.ts && node --import tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts && node scripts/prepare-pages.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.typecheck:runtime: npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.runtime.json
scripts.health:runtime: npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run test:runtime && npm run e2e:smoke
scripts.health:content: npm run content:prepare && npm run test:content && npm --prefix ChaTm run content:prepare && npm --prefix MexTm run content:prepare && npm --prefix EuTm run content:prepare
scripts.health:release: npm run build && npm run build:pages:glotm
scripts.health:all: npm run health:runtime && npm run health:content && npm run health:release && npm run health:report -- --runtime=pass --content=pass --release=pass
scripts.verify:release: npm run health:runtime && npm run health:release && npm run health:report -- --runtime=pass --release=pass
scripts.test:runtime: vitest run --exclude src/products/chinaManuscript.test.ts --exclude src/products/mexicoManuscript.test.ts --exclude src/products/europeManuscript.test.ts --exclude src/products/contentLinks.test.ts --exclude Reports/scripts/build-content.test.ts --exclude scripts/seo.test.ts
scripts.test:content: vitest run src/products/chinaManuscript.test.ts src/products/mexicoManuscript.test.ts src/products/europeManuscript.test.ts src/products/contentLinks.test.ts Reports/scripts/build-content.test.ts scripts/seo.test.ts
